name: Jamaican Iguana
conservationEfforts: Rediscovered in 1990 after being thought extinct since 1948. Hellshire Hills recovery program includes head-starting and mongoose control. Jamaica's Hope Zoo breeds captive iguanas.
description: Rediscovered in Jamaica's Hellshire Hills after 44 years of presumed extinction. The introduced Indian mongoose is its primary predator, and control programs have been essential for recovery.
